Our Story

The People Behind
Every Project We Touch

2016 Est. December

JCE Contractor LLC wasn't built overnight — it was built the right way. Founded in December of 2016, we started with a clear mission: show up, do the work right, and treat every customer like family. Nearly a decade later, that same commitment is at the core of everything we do.

We are a licensed, insured, and fully professional contracting company serving the Eastern United States. Our team is made up of skilled tradespeople who have been carefully evaluated and proven to deliver results. We don't cut corners, we don't make excuses — we get the job done.

What sets us apart isn't just the quality of our work — it's the way we work. We are organized, communicative, and detail-oriented from the first estimate to the final walkthrough. Our clients always know what to expect because we believe transparency builds trust. That's why so many of our customers come back to us project after project.

We are proud to serve both English and Spanish speaking customers — Hablamos español — because great work should be accessible to everyone, and clear communication is the foundation of every successful project.

From our crew to our clients, loyalty is everything at JCE. We stand behind our employees as much as we stand behind our work — because a team that's respected delivers results that speak for themselves.

🏅 Licensed & Insured Fully certified and compliant across all trades
🤝 Customer Loyal Built on repeat business and trusted referrals
🗣️ English & Spanish We communicate clearly in both languages
📅 Since 2016 Nearly a decade of proven professional service
⭐ Master Electricians Top-level certification backing every job
📋 Free Estimates No obligation — just honest, upfront pricing
Our Work

See It For Yourself

Real projects. Real homes. Real craftsmanship — delivered by the JCE team across the DMV area.

⚡ Pendant Chandelier — McLean, VA

Crystal pendant chandelier installed in a $2.7 million home in McLean, VA. Every wire concealed, every fixture level — exactly as the homeowner envisioned.

⚡ Ring Chandelier — Potomac, MD

Modern ring chandelier installed in a $3.1 million new construction home in Potomac, MD. Coordinated with the builder to ensure seamless integration during framing.

⚡ LED Ring Fixture — Falls Church, VA

Circular LED chandelier installed in a $2.4 million home in Falls Church, VA. Custom wiring and dimmer switch included for full ambiance control.

⚡ Column Chandelier — Annandale, VA

Gold column chandelier installed in a $2.8 million home in Annandale, VA. Required a dedicated circuit and ceiling reinforcement for safe support.

⚡ Crystal Chandelier — Annapolis, MD

Crystal beaded chandelier installed in a $3.5 million home in Annapolis, MD. Mounted to a vaulted ceiling with custom-length chain and reinforced junction box.

⚡ Globe Chandelier — Springfield, VA

Globe chandelier installed in a $2.2 million home in Springfield, VA. Fresh wiring run through the ceiling to bring power to a previously unlit location.

⚡ Staircase Chandelier — Great Falls, VA

Multi-pendant staircase chandelier installed in a $4.1 million home in Great Falls, VA. Installed over a two-story stairwell requiring scaffolding and precision alignment.

Why JCE

Why Choose Us?

There are a lot of contractors out there. Here's why homeowners and businesses across the Eastern United States keep choosing JCE.

8+
Years in Business
5+
Trades Offered
100%
Free Estimates
2
Languages Spoken
🏅

State Licensed & Insured

JCE Contractor LLC is fully licensed by the state and carries comprehensive insurance on every job. You're protected, and so is your property. We don't cut corners — legally or physically.

⚡

Master-Certified Electricians

Our electrical team holds master electrician certifications — the highest level of qualification in the trade. That means every wire, panel, and outlet is handled with expert precision and full code compliance.

✅

Quality You Can See & Feel

We don't consider a job done until it looks right, works right, and lasts. Every project — big or small — goes through the same quality standard because your home deserves nothing less than our best.

📅

8+ Years of Trusted Experience

Founded in December 2016, we've spent nearly a decade building a reputation for reliability, craftsmanship, and integrity. Our experience across multiple trades means fewer surprises and better results for you.

🗣️

English & Spanish Speaking

We proudly serve both English and Spanish speaking customers — hablamos español. Clear communication in your preferred language means no confusion and a smoother experience from start to finish.

💬

Honest, Transparent Pricing

We offer free estimates on every job and never surprise you with hidden fees. What we quote is what you pay. We'd rather earn your trust than a quick dollar — and that approach has kept our customers coming back for years.

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

Here are some of the most common questions we get. Don't see yours? Just give us a call or send us a message.

Yes — JCE Contractor LLC is fully licensed by the state and carries comprehensive liability insurance on every project. You can have total peace of mind knowing your home and family are protected throughout the entire job.

Absolutely — all estimates are 100% free and come with no obligation. We'll come take a look at your project, give you an honest assessment, and provide a clear quote so you know exactly what to expect before any work begins.

It depends on the scope of the work and our current schedule, but we always do our best to accommodate urgent needs. Give us a call at (571) 259-1487 and we'll find the earliest available time that works for you.

Yes! We work on both residential homes and commercial buildings across the Eastern United States. Whether it's a single-family home, rental property, or commercial space, our team has the experience and licensing to handle the job properly.

We are based on the Eastern side of the United States and serve the surrounding areas. Not sure if we cover your location? Give us a call or send us a message and we'll let you know right away.

Yes — and that's one of our biggest advantages. Because we offer electrical, plumbing, remodeling, concrete, and home additions all under one roof, we can coordinate multiple trades on the same project seamlessly. That means less hassle, fewer contractors to manage, and a smoother overall experience for you.

Sí — hablamos español. We proudly serve Spanish-speaking customers and can communicate fully in Spanish throughout your entire project, from the initial estimate to project completion. No language barrier, no confusion.

It's simple — just call us at (571) 259-1487, fill out the contact form on this page, or send us an email at jcecontractorllc2026@gmail.com. We'll get back to you promptly to schedule your free estimate and get the ball rolling.
